mapper.insert: insert into orders (number, status, user_id, seat_id, area_id, start_time, end_time, checkin_code, package_id, amount, pay_method, pay_status, order_time, checkout_time, cancel_time, cancel_reason) values (#{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{seatId}, #{areaId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{checkinCode}, #{packageId}, #{amount}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus}, #{orderTime}, #{checkoutTime}, #{cancelTime}, #{cancelReason})
